_meta.description: SSOT for UI structure. 9-service architecture per CITADEL_VISION_2026_03_22. Agents MUST read this before any structural changes.
_meta.architecture: 9 services, 3 APIs (auth-api, client-reporting-api, unified-trading-api), direct-to-tabs routing
